falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug assumed a higher low structure; a break below 4,800 would violate that analog's floor and invalidate the bottoming thesis, suggesting continuation lower rather than accumulation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score of 39 indicates controlled volatility/early recovery phase; sustained VIX above 35 would signal panic escalation inconsistent with the pattern's volatility compression, proving the market is in a different regime

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield falls below 3.80% while S&P 500 also falls more than 2% in the same 5-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a flight-to-safety/broken growth narrative rather than the pattern's typical 'rates down, equities stable/rising' dynamic, falsifying the macro coordination implied by the bottom_2024_aug analog

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
